verses.text: Ama khialhna kimaisak a, ama mawhna a kiselcipsak mi, thupha ngah ahi hi
Topa in mawhna a khuksakloh mi, a lungsim sungah khemna a omlo mi, thupha ngah ahi hi
Ka mawhna ka pulak loh ciangin, sunthapai ka tautauna hangin ka pumpi a thaneem hi
Sun leh zan tawntung gim nong piakna ka thuak a, khuakhal nisa' kat bangin ka thahatna a keucip hi
Keima khialhnate nangma tungah kong pulak a, ka mawhna ka im kei hi. “Ka khialhnate khempeuh Topa' tungah ka pulak ding hi,” ka ci hi. Tua ciangin ka mawhna nin nong maisak hi
Tua ahih ciangin nang hong kimuh theih lai-in mihoih khempeuh, nang tungah thu kingensak in. Tua hi leh tuikhang in amaute banlo ding hi
Nang pen kei-a' dingin ka bukna mun na hi a, haksatna pan kei hong kemin hotkhiatna kicing nong pia hi
Na paina ding lampi lakin ka hong hilh ding a, ka mit tawh hong enin thu kong hilh ding hi
A kamkaih tawh uk lohin a phamawh, thutheihna a neilo, sakol leh la bang kei in
Migilote in gimna tampi thuak uh a, Topa a muangte ahih leh itna kip in a hu hi
Thumante aw, Topa tungah lungdamin kipak un. Lungsim man mi khempeuh aw, lungdamin awng un!
